title: Migrate already-stamped Instances to the .cjs hook layout
description: Instances stamped before EXEC-075 (e.g. evo-gnit) carry the broken .js hooks and a settings.json pointing at them; under host "type":"module" every hook fails at require(). Extend migrate-policy so the Migrate command renames the stamped hook/rules files to .cjs, rewrites the settings.json hook commands, and removes the stale .js copies. The health check should flag an Instance still on the .js layout.
acceptance_criteria: Running the Migrate command on an Instance stamped with the old .js hooks leaves it on the .cjs layout: hooks renamed, settings.json commands updated, no stale .js hook files.
Migration is idempotent — a second run is a no-op.
Health check reports the .js layout as decayed/migration-due.
Verified end-to-end on evo-gnit: Stop hook runs without the ESM ReferenceError.
root_cause: Instances stamped before EXEC-075 carry CommonJS .js hooks that break under host "type":"module".
fix: migrate renames legacy .js hooks to .cjs (hash-guarded, idempotent, marker re-keying), rewrites settings.json commands and sibling requires; doctor flags .js layout MIGRATION-DUE. Landed in commit 7b54a6e after code-standards and package-qa PASS; verified live on evo-gnit.
